text: The reason your React component re-renders is that you create a new object on every render. Wrap the object creation in useMemo and pass stable dependencies.
Your database query times out because the statement scans too many rows without an index. Add an index on the filter columns and reduce the result set with a stricter where clause.

The request fails because the authentication middleware expects a bearer token but the client sends a raw token string. Send an Authorization header with the Bearer prefix and validate token expiry before retries.
